description: Make your runs easier and lighter with these Morin trainers from adidas. With its lightweight features, you can train better for longer.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for lightweight durability and breathabilityMesh tongue and collar with plush padding for snug FitLace-ups for snug fitThree fabric tape overlays across the sides signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievementOutsole extended onto the toe box and embedded onto it for better protection of the forefootBrand name embedded on the tongue and appliqued behind collarMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day step-in comfortFull length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioningOutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with arrow lugs for better grip and tractionFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feetToe guard for longer shoe life and protection to the forefootShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
